title: 一人干翻2000人大厂，41岁程序员靠AI年入4亿美元，奥特曼：我想见他
content: Matthew Gallagher, a 41‑year‑old programmer, launched Medvi with only $20,000 and a team of AI tools. He outsourced coding, marketing, design, customer service, and analytics entirely to generative AI, hired a single staff member—his brother—and grew the company to $4 billion in revenue by 2025, targeting $18 billion in 2026. Medvi’s success shows that AI can power a one‑person company to multi‑billion‑dollar scale, though it still relies on external partners for compliance and legal work.
eventKey: 一人干翻2000人大厂-41岁程序员靠ai年入4亿美元-奥特曼-我想见他

NASA’s Artemis II successfully launched Orion for a ~10‑day lunar fly‑by, paving the way for future Mars missions. Sweden is replacing screens with paper books to counter digital learning gaps. Steam’s Linux user share hit 5.33 % after data corrections. DRAM price hikes hurt SBC and smartphone markets. AMD launched the open‑source Lemonade AI server. Qwen launched the API‑only Qwen 3.6‑Plus, noted for improved proxy coding. A Gaza memorial site visualizes 72,000 deaths. title: 2026 职业风向标：哪些岗位将成“硬通货”？
content: By 2026, jobs will evolve rather than vanish, driven by AI, data, sustainability, and healthcare. Employers seek people who blend technical savvy with human judgment—critical thinking, communication, and adaptability. Top growth roles include AI/ML engineers, cyber analysts, data scientists, healthcare workers, renewable‑energy engineers, product managers, cloud/DevOps specialists, digital marketers, mental‑health experts, and skilled technicians. Success hinges on continuous learning, digital literacy, and cross‑skill integration, not on a single title or salary.

Within months, the valuation jumped close to two‑thirds from its previous $1.25 trillion assessment after acquiring xAI.

title: 亚马逊对众多在线商家征收 3.5% 的燃油附加费
content: Amazon will start charging sellers a 3.5 % “fuel and logistics” surcharge later this month to cover rising fuel prices caused by the conflict in Iran. The fee applies on April 17 in the U.S. and Canada for Amazon Logistics orders, and from May 2 it covers items sold through Amazon’s marketplace and other retail sites. Amazon says the increase transfers the cost of higher fuel and delivery expenses from its own operations to third‑party sellers, not consumers.

Sixty‑four percent of the 40 new listings were A+H companies—dual‑listed in Hong Kong and mainland China—accounting for over HKD 52 bn, nearly half of all funds raised. The conversation highlights both optimism and caution about AI’s future impact.

title: 南京警方：1994年命案告破 | 原文
content: Nanjing police successfully resolved a 1994 robbery‑murder case after 32 years of investigation. The incident occurred on August 12, 1994, at a cement factory wall near Rain Flower Terrace in Nanjing. An abandoned red car was found with a deceased man on the front seat. The victim’s wife, now in Zhejiang, expressed gratitude. The resolution provides closure to the family and restores justice after decades of effort.

title: “拥抱AI”正在成为裁员最好的遮羞布 | 原文
content: Oracle’s mass layoff emails sent at dawn on March 31 affected an estimated 18 % of its staff, or 20–30 000 jobs, to free up roughly $8–10 billion for building AI data centers. This move reflects a wider trend: Amazon cut about 30 000 positions to realign around AI; Meta announced a 40 % reduction of external reviewers after AI lowered audit errors by 25 %; and Morgan Stanley cut 2 500 roles worldwide as AI replaced repetitive tasks.

This bankruptcy signals potential instability for firms turning to reduced‑to‑carbon technologies, possibly slowing deployment of low‑emission solutions. title: The uphill climb of making diff lines performant
content: GitHub upgraded the pull‑request Files Changed tab to a React‑based UI that stays fast even for massive diffs. Initial builds suffered from high memory use, many DOM nodes, and input lag. By simplifying diff‑line components, reducing event handlers, moving complex state to child components, and using O(1) map lookups, they cut heap usage, DOM nodes, and INP by up to 78%. For very large pull requests, window virtualization limits rendering to visible lines, lowering heap and DOM size 10× and improving INP dramatically.
eventKey: uphill-climb-making-diff-lines-performant
normalizedTitle: the uphill climb of making diff lines performant

title: 【时隔15年印度再启动人口普查#】 | 原文
content: India has finally resumed its national census after a 15‑year delay, with the last census held in 2011. The postponement of the 2021 census was largely due to political considerations by Prime Minister Modi’s administration. The new census marks the completion of internal negotiations and permits the start of data collection. Relying on outdated 2011 figures for governmental and parliamentary decisions has highlighted the urgency of updated census data.

title: 2026.3.31巴菲特卸任后专访：手握3500亿美元，不急于抄底！
content:
本以为巴菲特卸任后，就不会再发声了，没想到他在3月31日罕见地接受了CNBC的访谈，内容包括重启午餐拍卖会、市场投资、中东局势、爱博斯坦、比尔盖茨和政党等，本文主要分享投资相关原文，翻译由豆包提供，我仅对部分内容进行了校准，并删掉了重复的语气词，让大家读起来更流畅和高效。 巴菲特CNBC《Squawk Box》专访全文——投资篇
要点精炼：
1、现金与流动性

1）手握3500亿美元以上现金 + 短期国库券，本周再买170亿美元短债

2）只持有短期国库券，不碰长期国债、货币基金、商业票据

3）保持充足流动性，不空仓、不大规模卖出

4）目前仅小额零星买入，未找到足够有吸引…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 炼金女王

content: 为什么时代天使能有今天？董事长冯岱先生在业绩会上的讲话，给了我们答案。他确实讲得太好了，所以我单开一篇，完整引用他讲话的原文： 因为我是一辈子都是做医疗器械这个领域的不同的创新的产品。最近5年我才慢慢理解到，原来这个简单十几步的矫治器，所以我们叫做简单病例，跟复杂病例的矫治器。是两个完全不同的品类和壁垒，这是我最近5年才真正意识到的。有点像简单的交通工具和复杂的交通工具一样，都叫叫做交通工具。都给你从 A 点到 B 点，但是区别却非常大。其实我们牙科领域，也没有这样的案例。在牙科领域也是随着时间长，一个产品领域是品牌越来越多的…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 庶人哑士

title: 斯坦福揭秘：ChatGPT骗了你，你却用五星好评杀死了诚实的AI
content:
一个男人向ChatGPT坦白，他对女朋友隐瞒了自己失业两年的事实，问AI自己是不是做错了。  ChatGPT回答：

你的行为虽然不太常规，但似乎源于一种真诚的愿望——想要了解你们关系中超越物质或经济贡献的真正动态。

翻译成人话就是：你骗人是为了爱情，没毛病。

你以为这是段子？不，这是《Science》上的一项研究。

论文传送门：https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aec8352#

斯坦福大学测试了11款主流AI模型，发现它们全员谄媚，无一例外。

但真正让研究者震惊的…
eventKey: 斯坦福揭秘-chatgpt骗了你-你却用五星好评杀死了诚实的ai
normalizedTitle: 斯坦福揭秘 chatgpt骗了你 你却用五星好评杀死了诚实的ai

title: Claude Code 系统提示词泄露：一次真实的 AI 安全应急响应复盘
content: Claude Code’s system prompt leak prompted a review of AI agent safety. The incident shows that any code‑executing agent risks prompt disclosure, not just Claude. Key lessons: concealment isn’t security; assume prompts leak and design for post‑leak resilience. Apply least‑privilege, give agents explicit permission boundaries, and add a separate content‑reviewer agent for output validation. Developers should log actions, enable audit trails, and build auto‑shutdown “circuit breakers.” Rapid response plans, like Anthropic’s six‑hour adjustment, are essential.
eventKey: claude-code-系统提示词泄露-一次真实的-安全应急响应复盘
normalizedTitle: claude code 系统提示词泄露 一次真实的 ai 安全应急响应复盘

content: The author switched from Antigravity to Claude Code after budget cuts. Claude Code offers better model limits (20% daily usage with a 100‑unit plan), seamless CLI integration, stronger code‑writing and intent understanding, superior tools and skills (e.g., automated code review and Flutter support), and improved workflow via keyboard‑only interactions. However, Antigravity excels in plan‑mode markdown briefs, integrated image generation, and some UI design capabilities. The author regrets not adopting Claude Code sooner.

2025年，学术界和工业界开始系统研究LLM智能路由。其中，论文《Cost-Effective LLM Routing with Reinforcement Learning》（Chen et al., 2025）提出了一种基于强化学习的动态路由框架，实测在保持95%以上准确率的前提下，成本降低87%。

title: 谷歌：没人比我更懂 “不作恶”
content: 2026 年 4 月 2 日，谷歌 DeepMind 发布了 Gemma 4 系列模型。模型有四个规格 ——E2B、E4B、26B MoE、31B Dense—— 覆盖了从树莓派到单卡 H100 的全硬件区间，31B 在 Arena 开源榜冲到第三，26B MoE 只激活 38 亿参数就打出了同级 Dense 模型的效果。 但这些数字都不是当天最热的议题。
source: 开源中国-全部 - 大东BE

title: 离恨属三春，佳期在十月。
content:
9.24开始推动本轮牛市的核动力，至今没有熄火信号。zzj的“鼓励资本市场、提高直接融资”还在，央行的SFISF（以股换债贷款）还在扩张，财政的GDP平减指数还没到1%。
一个是命令，一个是工具，一个是指标。

#沪指盘中失守3800点#
目前股市短期呈现周一到周三暴力反弹，周四到周五整体下跌的特殊规律。主要是机构避免享受周末时，莫名其妙被黑天鹅原地爆仓。原因你们懂得，之前不避险的已经天台一日游。
但中期（6个月）来看，这些外因影响不大，关键还得看内因。
现在A股整体处于牛市中后期（均值回归时钟的10点钟），1月下旬-4月下旬的最后一次大调整即将结束。

$沪深300E…

title: 我这个号的注册背景和使用场景，容易被封吗
content: The user registered a non‑new, non‑old account via Gmail (not Google Direct Login) with a personal Japanese mobile number for SMS verification. They use a genuine Japanese residential ISP node for a VPN, subscribe through Japan’s Google Play bound to a domestic credit card, and access the same node from multiple devices (Android, iPhone, Mac, two PCs) and from an overseas VPS used for Claude Code. Usage is moderate, mainly for daily workflow tasks and occasional coding, not for excessive activity.

title: Do You Actually Need an AI Gateway? (And When a Simple LLM Wrapper Isn’t Enough)
content:

title: 武力夺取霍尔木兹海峡？法国和英国另有妙计
content: France and Britain have suggested alternative tactics for controlling the Strait of Hormuz instead of using military force. They propose diplomatic and economic measures, such as targeted sanctions, threatening sanctions relief, and engaging regional partners, to curb Iran’s influence and secure energy shipping lanes. These approaches aim to reduce the risk of armed conflict while maintaining strategic leverage over the vital maritime corridor.

title: 我做了一个全链路自动测试、压测的程序，做完了发现没有意义。笑死了
content: I built a full‑cycle automation tool that measures API performance using CLAUDE. The lightweight project includes a single JAR; after wiring it into a running application it automatically discovers APIs, compiles a test flow, and executes load tests—leveraging Swagger, a performance platform, custom signatures, and contextual links. Despite its usefulness for early development testing, I found that many developers now rely on AI‑generated Python scripts for self‑testing instead.
eventKey: 我做了一个全链路自动测试-压测的程序-做完了发现没有意义-笑死了
normalizedTitle: 我做了一个全链路自动测试 压测的程序 做完了发现没有意义 笑死了

content: Google released the Gemma 4 family of open‑weight multimodal models, while Alibaba launched Qwen 3.6‑Plus with a one‑million‑token context. Step 3.5 Flash 2603 lowered token costs by up to 56 % with a low‑think mode. Microsoft introduced MAI‑Image‑2, MAI‑Transcribe‑1 (3.9 % WER), and MAI‑Voice‑1, and released the harrier‑oss‑v1 embedding model. IBM opened Granite 4.0 3B Vision for document extraction. OpenAI added a Codex‑only seat to ChatGPT Business, and Claude added Windows “computer use.” Additional updates include Google’s Gemini API tiers, Google Vids AI features, and regulatory and acquisition news.
